blockers.description: Context budget at 70%. Paused at clean state — Area 1 locked and checkpointed; 3 areas remaining + CONTEXT.md write.
blockers.workaround: Resume in fresh session; read 38.2-DISCUSS-CHECKPOINT.json (Area 1 already locked); continue at Area 2.

decisions.decision: Phase 38.2 scope: Bulletproof PnP enforcement (CM_Disable_DevNode) + Volume DACL deny-all as second real-time OS-enforced layer. Two independent layers. No kernel driver, no DLL injection.
decisions.rationale: Both layers are real-time and OS-enforced. PnP blocks at device tree (lowest layer); DACL blocks at NTFS check. Combined, every plug-in timing race window is covered.

decisions.decision: User-mode API hooking REJECTED with concrete rationale
decisions.rationale: EDR conflict (Defender/CrowdStrike/SentinelOne detect third-party hooking as malware), PPL processes inaccessible, WoW64 split, AppInit_DLLs deprecated, trivially bypassed via cmd.exe/PowerShell, doesn't catch SYSTEM/kernel I/O, CET incompatibility on Win11. NOT real defense in depth.

decisions.decision: Windows minifilter DEFERRED to future phase (v0.8.0+)
decisions.rationale: Multi-week kernel work, signing infrastructure (test → EV), BSOD risk during dev, IPC channel design. Out of 38.2 scope per ROADMAP wording.

decisions.decision: notify-based file watcher demoted to observability ONLY
decisions.rationale: It's a passive watcher (observe AFTER write); cannot block. PnP + DACL handle real enforcement.

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 38.2 in fresh session.
